title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Moria, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy as the scene develops across pages 2–5.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Moria, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken.

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: He is huge, even for a giant!

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: I'll give you a voice and flesh.

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: Forget everyone you knew in the past.

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: Abide my will and become my soldier!!

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: I can break your kneecaps*, too.

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: CINDRY is too harsh on hogback.

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Moria, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Luffy, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken.
